mapper.select: SELECT s.solution_id, s.algorithm, s.`type`, s.language, s.user_problem_id FROM solutions s JOIN user_problems up USING (user_problem_id) WHERE up.user_id = #{userId} AND s.user_problem_id = #{userProblemId} ORDER BY s.solution_id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO solutions (algorithm, `type`, language, code, user_problem_id) VALUES (#{algorithm}, #{type}, #{language}, #{code}, #{userProblemId})
